item.title: Face Score — AI‑Powered Aesthetics
item.description: A Streamlit app that scores facial aesthetics using a custom vision model and Hugging Face Spaces.

item.title: Iris MLOps Pipeline with AWS SageMaker
item.description: An end-to-end MLOps pipeline for Iris classification using AWS SageMaker.

Why Your Computer is a Terrible Gambler: The Science of Randomness Girish Kumar R Girish Kumar R Project Manager | CSM | AI practitioner | IBM AI Engineering Specialization Certified | Bangalore, India. 5 Years as a project manager and overall 12 years in IT industry

August 30, 2024 The Casino’s Secret: Why Computers Can’t Truly Roll the Dice Ever wondered why casinos seem to have an unfair advantage? It’s not just the house edge; it’s also the technology behind their games. While computers are incredibly powerful, they have a secret: they’re not very good at randomness.
